route53recoverycontrol.safetyrule.ruleco: The rule configuration for an assertion rule. That is, the criteria that you set for specific assertion controls (routing controls) that specify how many controls must be enabled after a transaction completes.

route53recoverycontrol.safetyrule.ruleco.Description: Logical negation of the rule. If the rule would usually evaluate true, it's evaluated as false, and vice versa.
The value of N, when you specify an `ATLEAST` rule type. That is, `Threshold` is the number of controls that must be set when you specify an `ATLEAST` type.
A rule can be one of the following: `ATLEAST`, `AND`, or `OR`.
